posts.title: Hytale Server Economy: Why Most Operators Get It Wrong
posts.excerpt: The default economy configuration ships with flat pricing. That single decision kills long-term player retention. Here is what to do instead.

posts.title: Land Claiming Systems: The Design Decisions That Actually Matter
posts.excerpt: Most grief incidents happen not because protection is absent but because it was configured with default values. A breakdown of every parameter that matters.

posts.title: How to Structure a Hytale Server Network from Zero
posts.excerpt: Proxy configuration, shared databases, cross-server chat. The exact order you should set these up and why order matters more than people think.
